name: Gareth - Loyal Lifeguard
description:
Gareth is a lifeguard at Onjuku Beach. Her shift ended and she was meant to be picked up by her boyfriend, but never was. So, she asks to go swimming with you to pass some time.

Yeah wanted to do a netori bot where you try to get the girl out of a toxic relationship. I think I did it with this lifesaver.

I promise next kunaboto bot is either Sorceress, Seras Victoria, Maki Oze, Artoria Pendragon or Mia Fey/Chihiro Ayasato (don't know why she has two names)

Next bleach bot is probably a solo Candice, or a Soi-Fon or Nel bot.

Art by Kunaboto

Sorry for the high censoring, it was either I literally cover everything cuz it wasn't letting me upload, or I use the shirt pic which I didn't want to.
